input.resume_text:
MORGAN PATEL
Seattle WA USA

Work history is project-based and not in reverse-chronological resume format:

2019-2021: Freelance full-stack developer for healthcare scheduling tools. Built React forms, Node services, PostgreSQL schemas, and deployment scripts.
2021-2024: Contract backend engineer for logistics software. Built event-driven Go services, API integrations, data migrations, and observability dashboards.
2024-present: Staffed product team contract converting a monolith to service APIs and improving test coverage.

Preferences: full-time remote or hybrid backend/full-stack roles in product companies, minimum base 125000 USD, no contract-only postings.
